settings.PAGES:
[{"id":"dp_1777455674493","title":"Features","content":"> Tibbo Modbus Gateways route Modbus requests and replies between Modbus TCP, Modbus ASCII, and Modbus RTU masters and slaves. 
 
---
 
## Networking
 
- **100/10 Mb Ethernet port** (standard on all models)
- **Optional Wi-Fi port:**
  - WEP / WPA / WPA2 security support
  - Automatic failover to Wi-Fi when the Ethernet cable is unplugged
- **IP configuration:** Static IP or DHCP
---
 
## Serial Ports
 
### TPS2(G2)-based Gateways
- Up to **four** RS232 or RS232/485 ports
- Baudrates up to **460,800 bps**
- Parity modes: None\*, Even, Odd, Mark, Space
- Character size: 7\* or 8 bits
- Optional **RTS/CTS flow control**
 
---
 
## Modbus Protocol Support
 
- Supports up to **8 TCP masters** and up to **4 TCP slaves**
- **Flexible routing** in any direction:
  - Modbus TCP → Modbus RTU or ASCII
  - Modbus RTU or ASCII → Modbus TCP
  - Modbus TCP → Modbus TCP
  - Modbus RTU or ASCII → Modbus RTU or ASCII
- **Slave ID-based routing** (works with all Modbus master types)
- **TCP port-based routing** (for Modbus TCP masters; 4 ports available)
- **Slave ID shifting**
- **Modbus exception handling:**
  - Timeout exception
  - Routing error exception
---
 
## Configuration
 
- Via **DS Manager** utility (desktop software)
- Via **web interface** (browser-based)
---
 
## Monitoring & Diagnostics
 
- **LED status indication** on all models
- **Display status indication** (on models with optional OLED/LCD)
- **SNMP protocol** support for remote configuration monitoring

---
 
## Power Options
 
- **12V or 24V** DC power input
- Optional **PoE (Power over Ethernet)**
---
 
## Hardware Options
 
- Optional **Wi-Fi**
- Optional **PoE**
---
 
## TPS-based Gateway Customization
 
- Standard configurations available out of the box
- Custom configurations via the **Online Configurator**:
  - Choose number and type of serial ports
  - Select power arrangement (12V, 24V, or PoE)
  - Add Wi-Fi and/or LCD display
  - Add **sensor inputs** and **relay outputs** as side features
---
 
## Firmware
 
- **Open-source** firmware
- Fully customizable: modify, extend, or rebrand as needed
- Custom development available through AppBlocks
---
